biography:
Jack Garcia & Co.
Natural Light | Timeless Storytelling
Lifestyle | Weddings
Based in Florida | Available for Travel
DM to Inquire

latestPosts.caption:
After a lot of thought, I decided it was time for a change.

J.D.G. Images is now Jack Garcia & Co.

I wanted something that truly feels like mine, a name I can grow with and make my own.
With more bookings and new add-ons 👀, now felt like the perfect time to take this next step.

Thank you to everyone who’s been part of this journey and supported me through the transition.

Same vision. New name. New chapter.

#jackgarciaco
